zh.Radcliffe, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾拉德克利夫
zh.Radcliffe Tower, Bury, Lancashire, Engla: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾拉德克利夫
zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam de Radcliffe於1188年12月15日出生在英國藍卡爾拉德克利夫時，他的父親Lord William de Radcliffe24歲，母親Lady Cecilia De Monthegon23歲。他於1210年與Joan de Curwen在英國英格蘭藍卡爾拉德克利夫結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1248年在他的家鄉享年60歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾拉德克利夫。

zh-hans.Radcliffe Tower, Bury, Lancashire, Engla: 英国英格兰藍卡爾拉德克利夫
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam de Radcliffe于1188年12月15日出生在英国藍卡爾拉德克利夫时，他的父亲Lord William de Radcliffe24岁，母亲Lady Cecilia De Monthegon23岁。他于1210年与Joan de Curwen在英国英格兰藍卡爾拉德克利夫结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1248年在他的家乡享年60岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾拉德克利夫。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Radcliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ratliff
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from one or more of the places so named, such as Radcliffe (Lancashire), Radcliffe on Trent and Ratcliffe on Soar (both Nottinghamshire), Radclive (Buckinghamshire), Ratcliffe Culey and Ratcliffe on the Wreake (both Leicestershire), Ratclyffe in Clyst Hydon, Ratcliffes in Thorverton, and Ratcliffes in Broad Clyst (all Devon), Ratcliff in Stepney (Middlesex), and Rackley in Compton Bishop (Somerset). The placenames derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + clif ‘cliff, bank, steep slope’ (see also Rutley ). A family of the name Radcliffe trace their descent from Sir Nicholas de Radclyffe. He is said to have been a knight who held the major of Radcliffe in Lancashire and served Roger de Poitou, Baron de Marsey in the 11th century.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam de Radcliffe was born on 15 December 1188, in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, his father, Lord William de Radcliffe, was 24 and his mother, Lady Cecilia De Monthegon, was 23. He married Joan de Curwen in 1210, in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1248, in his hometown, at the age of 60, and was buried in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam de Radcliffe est né le 15 décembre 1188, à Radcliffe, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Lord William de Radcliffe, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Lady Cecilia De Monthegon, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Curwen en 1210, à Radcliffe, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1248, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Radcliffe, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam de Radcliffe am 15. Dezember 1188 in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord William de Radcliffe 24 und seine Mutter Lady Cecilia De Monthegon 23. Er hat 1210 in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Joan de Curwen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1248 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Radcliffe è nato il il 15 dicembre 1188 nel Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Lord William de Radcliffe, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Lady Cecilia De Monthegon, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Curwen nel 1210, nel Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1248, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Radcliffe, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Radcliffeが1188年12月15日にイギリスランカシュアイアラドクリフで生まれた時，父Lord William de Radcliffeは24歳，母Lady Cecilia De Monthegonは23歳であった。1210年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアラドクリフでJoan de Curwenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1248年に故郷で60歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアラドクリフにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Radcliffe(이)가 1188년 12월 15일 영국 랭카실르 라드c리프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord William de Radcliffe(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Cecilia De Monthegon(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1210년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 라드c리프에서 Joan de Curwen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1248년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 라드c리프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam de Radcliffe nasceu em 15 de dezembro de 1188, em Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord William de Radcliffe, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Lady Cecilia De Monthegon, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Curwen em 1210, em Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1248, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam de Radcliffe родился 15 декабря 1188 г. в местности радклифф, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord William de Radcliffe было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Cecilia De Monthegon, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Curwen в 1210 г. в местности радклифф, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1248 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности радклифф, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam de Radcliffe nació el 15 de diciembre de 1188, en Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord William de Radcliffe, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Lady Cecilia De Monthegon, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Joan de Curwen en 1210, en Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1248, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
